title: bromus cappadocicus subsp. sclerophyllus
intro: Bromus cappadocicus subsp. sclerophyllus, also known as Turkish brome, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Bromus cappadocicus subsp. sclerophyllus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams.
